primaryName: Greater Rochester Habitat for Humanity ReStore

webVerification.sourceLabel: Greater Rochester Habitat for Humanity ReStore page
webVerification.notes: Web confirms (585) 444-9588 as the Greater Rochester Habitat ReStore (East Henrietta location: 2199 E Henrietta Rd 14623). Multiple ReStore locations: Culver Rd 14609, E Henrietta 14623, Webster 14580. Flower City Habitat office is separate at 585-546-1470.
